name: Batter for Frying - Oriental
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Garlic powder; or fresh garlic, finely minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix eggs, salt, garlic (minced or powdered), flour, cornstarch, and milk to make a smooth batter.
2. Mix honey, lemon juice, sherry, and ginger together and marinate shrimp (split in the back), lobster (cut into cubes), chicken (cut into pieces 1 inch x 2), or thin-sliced pork for at least 15 minutes.
3. Fry dipped pieces in peanut oil until light brown.
Option: Cool fried pieces after frying, then refrigerate if desired. Later, redip in batter and refry until golden brown and crunchy. Great as appetizers for a party that you can prepare ahead and still serve hot at the last minute. This recipe makes enough batter for 1 lb of shrimp, lobster meat, chicken, or pork.
